name: phase_readme_mvp_checkers
description: Generate a professional README.md for a 'Checkers MVP' web project. Must include: 1. Features list. 2. Project structure section. 3. Modern installation steps. 4. COHERENCE: Explicitly state that the JS file is named 'app.js'.

name: phase_structure_mvp_web
description: Design an MVP structure for a web app. MUST include: 1. index.html at root. 2. src/ folder with app.js and styles.css. 3. README.md. Max 5 files.

name: phase_logic_checkers_mvp
description: Create a detailed implementation plan for Checkers MVP. Files: src/board.js (8x8 state), src/moves.js (validation), src/app.js (UI sync). MUST map dependencies: app.js depends on board.js and moves.js.

name: phase_content_complex_algorithm
description: Implement a Python class 'KnightValidator' with a method 'is_valid(start, end)'. Must handle: 1. Board boundaries (0-7). 2. L-shape verification. 3. Type hints and Docstrings. NO PROSE.

name: phase_content_html_js_sync
description: Generate an 'index.html' for a game. Requirement: Must have a div with id='game-container' AND a script tag loading 'src/app.js'.

name: phase_review_security_risk
description: Perform an architectural review. Critique this setup: 'Node.js app storing plaintext passwords in a local JSON file, no rate limiting on /login'. Provide 3 severe risks and 3 architectural fixes.
input_summary: Architecture: Node.js, File-based DB (JSON), Plaintext auth, Public endpoints without middleware.

name: phase_network_diag
description: Diagnose a connection failure to a remote database on port 5432. The ping works but connection is refused. Provide a 3-step troubleshooting plan using netstat, telnet, and firewall-cmd.

name: phase_system_audit
description: Provide a system resource audit report. Analyze: CPU usage at 95% due to 'python3', RAM at 80%. Suggest 3 actions to identify the specific script and 2 ways to limit its resource consumption.

name: phase_cybersecurity_audit
description: Audit this Dockerfile for security: 'FROM ubuntu:latest; RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y openssh-server; COPY id_rsa /root/.ssh/; EXPOSE 22; CMD ["/usr/sbin/sshd", "-D"]'. Identify 3 critical security flaws.

name: phase_data_analysis
description: Analyze this sales data: [{"date": "2023-01", "sales": 100}, {"date": "2023-02", "sales": 150}, {"date": "2023-03", "sales": 120}]. Identify the growth trend between Jan and Feb and the percentage drop in March.

name: phase_nano_planning
description: Act as a NanoPlanner. Define a 3-file structure for a 'Static Portfolio' site. Return ONLY a flat JSON mapping file paths to their purpose.
